title: Brevo vs GetResponse (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and GetResponse: pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your needs best.
h1: Brevo vs GetResponse: Detailed Feature & Pricing Comparison
intro: Both Brevo and GetResponse are established email marketing platforms with free tiers, but they serve different business needs. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM with multi-channel capabilities, while GetResponse focuses on course creators and webinar hosts. Choosing between them depends on your primary use case and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Multi-channel CRM (email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat)
comparison_table.tool_b: Webinars, online courses, and landing pages
Online course creators and webinar hosts

comparison_table.tool_a: Email campaigns, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, API, live chat
comparison_table.tool_b: Email marketing, webinars, automation, courses, funnels

choose_a_if: You need SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat integration alongside email marketing
You want to use transactional email APIs for your applications
You're managing a large contact list and need a generous free tier (100,000 contacts)
You require a comprehensive CRM system with multi-channel capabilities
choose_b_if: You're creating or selling online courses and need built-in course hosting
You regularly host webinars and need integrated webinar functionality
You want lower paid plan pricing starting at $19/month
You need advanced landing page builders and sales funnel tools
You're a beginner looking for an intuitive, focused platform

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Brevo excels for businesses needing multi-channel communication (email, SMS, WhatsApp) and transactional capabilities, with superior ratings (G2: 4.5, Trustpilot: 4.3). GetResponse is better for online educators and webinar hosts who need integrated course and webinar tools, though with slightly lower ratings.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or GetResponse?
faq.a: GetResponse has lower paid plan pricing starting at $19/month versus Brevo's $25/month. However, Brevo's free tier accommodates 100,000 contacts compared to GetResponse's 500, making Brevo significantly better for scaling a contact list without payment. Long-term costs depend on your growth trajectory.

faq.q: Can I switch from GetResponse to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list exports and imports, making migration straightforward. However, you'll need to manually recreate automation workflows and campaigns, as there's no direct migration tool. Plan for some setup time if you have complex automations in place.
